body:
## What's Changed

- ee42731 ci: temporarily disable notarization (awaiting new certificate)

- f881c13 design: merge relationship-x-cosmetic frames into ui-design.pen

- cafdc84 fix: remove invalid notarization field from tauri.conf.json (Tauri v2 uses env vars)

body:
## What's Changed

- d962cd9 fix: update Tauri signing pubkey (new keypair, password stored securely)

- 959e497 design: update new-note-creation.pen for unsaved state

- 52b1693 fix: property dropdowns adapt to narrow panel width

name: First alpha release
body:
## What's Changed
* feat: leaner note creation — immediate creation + fix + buttons by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/1
* feat: rename note by double-clicking tab — fix editor content disappearing by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/2
* test: bring frontend coverage to 84% (was 47%) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/3
* fix: resolve all ESLint errors — pnpm lint exits 0 cleanly by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/5
* fix: note mutation propagation — sync in-memory entries after property/rename changes by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/12
* feat: vault from GitHub — create or clone a vault from a GitHub repo by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/13
* feat: collapsible sidebar and note list (Cmd+1/2/3) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/11
* feat: auto-build, GitHub Release, and in-app updater by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/14
* feat: auto-build, GitHub Release, and in-app updater by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/15
* feat: Properties inspector — editable vs read-only distinction by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/17
* fix: remove broken auto-save, add explicit Cmd+S save, fix rename-before-save by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/19
* feat: Rimuovi proprietà 'Is a' — type: come chiave canonica by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/16
* feat: click opens note in current tab, Cmd+Click opens new tab by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/22
* fix: vault picker — aggiungi opzione crea vault locale by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/18
* feat: bidirectional relationships (Referenced By panel) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/25
* feat: color wikilinks by destination note type by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/26
* perf: virtual list rendering for NoteList (react-virtuoso, 9000+ notes) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/27
* feat: modified notes indicator (orange dot in NoteList, TabBar, StatusBar) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/28
* feat: replace GitHub token field with OAuth device flow login by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/20
* feat: drag & drop image support in editor by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/23
* fix: commit & push now saves pending content and refreshes modified files by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/24
* Fix: wikilink underline follows type color by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/30
* refactor: split vault.rs into focused submodules (CodeScene 7.29 → 10.0) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/21
* fix: image upload regression — simplify useImageDrop to not duplicate BlockNote upload by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/29
* fix: remove broken Create New Vault button, unify with Open Local Folder by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/34
* fix: drag-and-drop tab order persistence by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/35
* fix: surface actual error messages in GitHub OAuth login flow by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/36
* fix: refresh dirty state after rename so indicator reflects reality by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/37
* fix: exclude YAML frontmatter from word count by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/39
* fix: require 2+ chars before showing wikilink autocomplete, limit to 20 results by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/38
* fix: add 1px inset border between macOS window frame and app content by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/40
* feat: editable relations in Inspector panel by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/41
* feat: URL properties open in browser on click, underline on hover by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/44
* feat: editable type picker in Properties panel by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/42
* refactor: raise CodeScene code health threshold to 9.2 by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/46
* fix: use consistent 12px text size for property values in Properties panel by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/43
* feat: Changes view — clicking N pending shows modified notes by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/45
* feat: expand icon picker to 290 Phosphor icons with search and scroll by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/47
* feat: distinguish new notes (green dot) from modified notes (orange dot) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/48
* fix: use type-defined colors and icons in Relations/Backlinks/ReferencedBy panels by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/49
* fix: use type-defined colors and icons in Relations/Backlinks/ReferencedBy panels by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/50
* fix: deduplicate autocomplete suggestions and fix arrow-key navigation by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/54
* fix: derive green pallino from git status instead of in-memory tracker by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/52
* fix: use Tauri opener plugin for URL property clicks by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/51
* fix: rename fails on empty notes — handle empty frontmatter block by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/55
* fix: apply text-[12px] to URL values in Properties panel by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/56
* fix: align Type row padding with other property rows in Properties panel by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/57
* fix: debounce Cmd+N to prevent slow note creation on rapid keystrokes by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/58
* fix: pass modifiedFiles to NoteList so Changes view filters correctly by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/53
* fix: exclude title heading and wikilinks from word count by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/59
* feat: flat list autocomplete with type badge by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/60
* feat: command palette (Cmd+K) — quick actions and navigation by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/61
* refactor: extract hooks from App.tsx to improve code health (8.95 → 10.0) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/62
* refactor: improve code health in github.rs, mock-tauri.ts, lib.rs by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/63
* refactor: split mock-tauri.ts into focused modules (8.81 → 10.0) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/65
* fix: relation chips now show type color instead of default blue by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/68
* fix: add error recovery to optimistic note creation by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/69
* feat: person mention — @mention autocomplete linking to Person entries by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/66
* feat: full-text search with qmd backend and SearchPanel UI (Cmd+Shift+F) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/64
* fix: remove double border-radius causing rounded corners below macOS title bar by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/72
* fix: backlinks update reactively when wiki-links are added or removed by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/70
* fix: restore Cmd+1/2/3 layout shortcuts (regression from App.tsx refactor) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/71
* fix: allow standard text shortcuts in command palette input by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/73
* feat: relations autocomplete shows note type badges (matching wiki-link UX) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/74
* fix: show type label for all notes in wiki-link autocomplete by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/76
* ci: switch test job from macos-latest to self-hosted runner by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/67
* feat: Unify note search/autocomplete into a single reusable component by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/78
* feat: back/forward navigation between opened notes by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/75
* feat: populate macOS menu bar with native menus (File, Edit, View, Window) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/77
* feat: unified search panel — progressive keyword+semantic results by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/80
* perf: speed up Cmd+N note creation from ~150ms to ~16ms by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/81
* refactor: reorganize ui-design.pen — 65 frames into logical groups by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/86
* feat: smart property display — type-aware rendering with display mode override by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/83
* feat: auto-pull vault changes from Git (background sync + conflict handling) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/79
* feat: darken title bar headers for visual separation from content by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/85
* fix: deduplicate inspector panels (Relations, Backlinks, Referenced By) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/82
* fix: resolve custom type color and icon in all autocomplete contexts by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/84
* fix: restore properties panel header height to match tab bar by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/87
* perf: defer vault entries update via startTransition for instant tab creation by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/90
* feat: status property — Notion-style dropdown with color chips by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/97
* feat: redesign Add Property as inline horizontal form with type selector by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/100
* feat: structured design system in ui-design.pen by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/95
* feat: note type labels — use light type color background by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/93
* feat: replace custom date picker with shadcn/ui Calendar + Popover by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/98
* design: add full-layout context frames to ui-design.pen by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/96
* revert: remove titlebar color darkening — superseded by custom drag region by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/88
* feat: git status bar — show last commit link, remove branch name by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/92
* fix: hide empty Backlinks, Relations, and Referenced By sections by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/99
* feat: note subtitle — show metadata (date + word count) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/94
* test: fix 5 failing tests after react-day-picker addition by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/101
* refactor: extract useEditorTabSwap hook from Editor by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/102
* fix: remove duplicate type icon in add property form by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/107
* feat: type-aware property value inputs (date picker, boolean toggle, status dropdown) by @LucaRonin in https://github.com/refactoringhq/laputa-app/pull/110
